ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for contact purposes */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact purposes */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address for demographic analysis */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level (e.g., High School, Bachelor's, Master's) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Current occupation (e.g., Student, Professional) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth for more accurate age calculations */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the participant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the participant record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personality_traits" (
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personality traits record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant the traits belong to */,
  "openness" INTEGER /* Openness score of the participant (1-10) */,
  "neuroticism" INTEGER /* Neuroticism score of the participant (1-10) */,
  "conscientiousness" INTEGER /* Conscientiousness score of the participant (1-10) */,
  "agreeableness" INTEGER /* Agreeableness score of the participant (1-10) */,
  "extraversion" INTEGER /* Extraversion score of the participant (1-10) */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the personality traits were assessed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the traits record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the traits record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trait_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personality_traits_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personality_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personality class */,
  "class_label" TEXT /* Label for the personality class (e.g., extraverted, serious) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class and its traits */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the class was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to participant assessed */,
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the personality traits recorded */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the personality class assigned */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was conducted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the assessment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the assessment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES personality_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_trait_id FOREIGN KEY ("trait_id") REFERENCES personality_traits ("trait_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_logs" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment from which report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_logs_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity was logged */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trait_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* Reference to personality traits analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "insights" TEXT /* Insights and findings from the analysis */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trait_analysis_trait_id FOREIGN KEY ("trait_id") REFERENCES personality_traits ("trait_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trait_analysis_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics_analysis" (
  "demo_analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographics analysis */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender category analyzed */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group category (e.g., 18-24, 25-34) */,
  "average_extraversion" REAL /* Average extraversion score for the demographic group */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_analysis_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
